config.kitMics: Schoeps MK41, Schoeps MK4. Schoeps MiniCMIT, Schoeps KMIT, DPA 6060, DPA 6061
config.kitTxRx: Wisycom MCR54, MTP61 x4, MTP41 x4

1.notes: - No Dia - mostly movements and breaths will be important. Plant mics where possible for movements.
1.description:
An artist lives here, there's no doubtabout it. Dozens of canvases lean against the walls of the small living room.
In the distance, one can glimpse endless fields, colorful bouquets of flowers, and radiant sunrises.
But the colorful paintings are dusty and cluttered with grey landscapes that become increasingly abstract from picture to picture.
A brush is applied. Pale colors spread across the canvas, forming abstract structures.
In front of this almost black and white picture on the easel stands MARGRET(78), a petite lady with faded red hair.
Now we realize how gloomy the whole room is. Everything looks gray and lifeless. The thin curtains in front of the window
have long since yellowed. Stacks of books and dust bunnies are piled up in the strangest places. A dead moth lies
gathering dust under the table lamp.
Hardly any sunlight penetrates the apartment; instead, there is the screaming of angry children, aggressive barking of dogs,
and thunder and rumbling from the backyard. Eerie shadows are cast behind the thin curtains.
Startled, Margret looks up from her picture, wraps her cardigan tighter around her thin body, and steps forward to close the
heavy, dark velvet curtains.
shotList: 1.4 CU Hände Magrid auf Canvas
1.2 ECU von Hand auf ECU Auge
1.5 NAH von hinten auf Magrid -sie dreht sich um und taucht den Pinsel in das Glas, neue Farben drauf und wieder zum Canvas (30min)
1.7 ULTRA WIDE: Reveal Magrid’s Wohnung Magrid legt Pinsel und Schatulle ab und stampft in Richtung Fenster (30min)
1.8 OS CU Magrid am Vorhang (30min)
1.3 CU Magrid wie sie malt
1.6 ECU Magrids Augen
1.problems: Specific lighting through window mentioned many times (careful with shadows).

2.notes:
- lots of action, likely a lot of audible direction
- breaths very likely
2.description:
Relieved, she returns to the canvas, looks at the withered bouquet of flowers in front of her, and picks up her brush - but it doesn't seem to be working out quite right today.
Frustrated, she sets her teacup down. With such force that a pigment container at the other end of the table is set in motion. Then it falls over.
As they fall, the pigments detach from the glass, swirl around, and seem to form something. Margret doesn't notice.
She switches on the table lamp next to her, and the small light slowly tries to fight against the darkness of her apartment. Something flits through Margret's field of vision, past the wall. What was that? Margret is jolted out of her trance.
But there's nothing to see. She shakes her head. Back at the screen, there it scurries again. And rustles.
Margret hesitates. She clutches the brush and tries to make out something in the dark corner. No chance, the light doesn't reach that
far.
Just as she's about to turn away, a brightly colored tube of paint rolls towards her and stops at her slipper. Margret stares.
First to color, then into darkness.
She slowly backs away, grabbing an umbrella leaning against the wall with one hand. She stumbles towards the bedroom, her
eyes never leaving the dark corner.
shotList: 2.1 Magrid kommt von der Unschärfe wieder an den Canvas getreten in ein ECU
2.2 OS auf den riesigen grauen Canvas…
2.3 MID SHOT auf Magrid von hinten, sie legt den Pinsel ab und… Ein Pigmentdöschen fällt um: Es bildet sich ein Nebelturm! (VFX 01)
2.4 NAH auf Magrid (handheld) + 2.6 CU Magrid’s Angst steigt (handheld)
2.5 HALBNAH, wir beobachten Magrid etwas aus der Ferne (hendheld)
2.8 ONE TAKE: Makgrid rennt durch ihre Wohnung, schnappt sich einen Regenschirm und sprintet ins Zimmer
2.7 ECU aus dem Nichts rollt etwas auf ihre Füße zu… (Scooter, Dolly Fahrt?)
2.problems: - Multi room, check camera movements and make sure to plan for any multi room takes

3.description: Then very quickly: door open, Margret in, door closed. Tonight she'll sleep upright, armed with an umbrella.
shotList: 3.1 Magrid kommt ins Zimmer gerannt und hüpft erstmal bewaffnet auf’s Bett
3.2 ECU, Magrid Angstgefühl steigt
3.3 TOTAL, Magrid sitzt alleine auf ihrem Bett

4.notes:
- Second half of scene utilises far more VFX, can record sound but will be very sound design heavy.
- lots of movements and breaths in first half, one dialog line in sceond half when chasing shadow
4.description:
When Margret wakes up, she is still holding the umbrella tightly in her arms.
Armed with caution, she ventured out of the bedroom again. Surely it was all just a dream.
Just to be sure, she checks in the corner, but there's only chaos. She mutters to herself as she does so.
But she immediately notices that someone has opened the curtains. The unfamiliar sunlight dazzles her. She
reaches out her hand to shield herself and tiptoes to the window.
As she resolutely draws the curtains shut, her gaze falls upon a few green paint splatters on the fabric.
The traces of paint continue on the floor and lead directly to the canvas.
And, oh dear, a small shadow made of colorful pigments is frolicking about on it, having just destroyed Margret's grey picture
with its green handprints.
Margret gasped in shock, the shadow froze. They glanced at each other briefly, then Margret darted towards him, waving her
hands. "Get out of here!" The shadow fled.
She has to save her picture! She paints over the colorful marks with white paint, but only smeares everything even more.
She sighs.
shotList: 4.1 NAH, Magrid kommt in den Vordergrund in die Schärfe gesprungen
4.2 HN Magrid verlässt Schlafzimmer (Track Dolly Shot)
4.3 CU, Magrid wie sie den Vorhang zuzieht- Wir folgen der Spur über den Boden bis… TOTALE, BOBO sitzt vor dem Canvas! (VFX02)
4.4 Magrid rennt in eine NAHAUFNAHME zum Canvas und will diesen retten!
4.5 CU auf Canvas… Magrid will diesen retten!

5.notes:
Silent mutterings - ensure good lav placement.
lots of actions, prepare to plant for multi room shot
5.description:
First things first, breakfast.
But when she opens the refrigerator door, an olive pit falls on her head. She looks up in disbelief.
There isn't really a shadow sitting on top, with the half-empty olive jar next to it.
Completely annoyed, she slams the door shut again and takes a pear from the fruit basket instead.
She strides purposefully towards the canvas. She'll just have to start over. She fetches a new canvas from the corner, but as she does,
the shadow throws one brush after another onto the floor.
shotList: 5.1 AMERIKANISCHE auf Magrid, wie sie den Canvas erneut wechselt…Doch da war doch was… Magrid geht in die Küche,schaut sich um und öffnet den Kühlschrank…
5.3 POV auf: BOBO mit einem Olivenglas in der Hand (VFX 03)
5.4 2 SHOT, OS auf Bobo. (VFX 04)
5.5 OS in den leeren Kühlschrank
5.2 POV auf Magrid, sie schaut sich um… Eine Olive fällt ihr auf den Kopf (kein HAZE!)

6.description: Pencils roll down, Magrid can't believe it.
shotList: 6.1 CU Magrid, Stiffte rollen im Off runter, Fahrt auf den Stuhl zu (Scooter/ Dolly Fahrt)
6.2 NAH, UNTERSICHTIG auf Magrid

7.notes: - no scripted dia, but breaths likely
7.description:
Motion Sequence:
The traces of chaos continue:
A half-eaten pear in the fruit basket.
Margret closes the open curtain.
Dirty brushes are standing in a teacup instead of in brush water.
Margret closes the open curtain.
Black, white, and grey paint tubes were all thrown on the ground.
Margret, annoyed, pulls the curtain closed.
The colorful paint tubes and pigment pots are scattered haphazardly all over the table; some have already
leaked.
Margret, very annoyed, pulls the curtain closed.
shotList: 1.5 hours planned - no shots specified.

8.notes:
- likely a lot of VFX
- multi room
8.description:
(breathing) Thanks.
The shadow tilts its head as if surprised by the small word.
Margret dips her brush into the yellow paint again, this time quite deliberately. And Margret paints. She reaches for bright
colors: green, pink, red.
The shadow steps onto an open tube of paint and squeezes a bright blue onto her palette.
Margret's radiance returns, the paintbrush seems to develop a mind of its own.
His work seems to be done, and so the shadow creeps, silently and stealthily, to the window. A jerk, and a ray of
light breaks through the thick curtains.
The sun shines over the chaos, the canvases, the splashes of paint, and finally over Margret's hands. She
lets it happen.
The shadow writhes in the light, glittering and shining and spinning. It whirls around, losing first one, then two, then three
particles.
It swirls directly over the pigment container from which it initially emerged. Slowly, it dissolves, and the pigments trickle
back into the container.
Machine Translated by Google
(Later)
Margret finishes her artwork, a colorful bouquet of flowers, and breathes a sigh of relief. In the light, her cheeks glow
bright red.
MARGRET
Just look!
She turns around, beaming with pride, but there's no sign of the shadow. There's no one there for Margret to show her
picture to.
She looks under the dresser. Nothing. In the refrigerator. Nothing.
Then Margret shrugs. That's what she wanted all along, isn't it?
She has her peace and quiet again.
MARGRET (CONT'D)
(murmuring)
It was about time you disappeared.
Was that it? Margret is very unsure. But what choice does she have but to return to her routine?
Margret gets up and walks into the kitchen. There's a half-eaten pear in the fruit bowl. Margret sighs.
Margret looks in the refrigerator. There's one last olive in the jar. She doesn't touch it.
Margret stands in front of the canvas. The flower painting radiates towards her, full of color, full of joy – but something
is wrong with Margret.
She looks around her studio, everything so gray, everything so still. Then her gaze falls on the glittering particles of color,
dancing in the light. Light. Sunlight.
Margret examines the gap in the curtain. Cautiously, she peers through it, outwards. For the first time, really looking at it
properly.
We don't see everything that's going on, but we do see Margret's features. First thoughtful, then determined.
She turns around with a jerk.

9.notes:
Margret has no scripted dialog, but could improvise a response.
Likely no plants needed. Can be prepped and added on set if required.
9.description:
Now we finally see everything Margret saw.
Magnificent wildflowers are blooming, very close by. Then slowly we recognize more of the surroundings. We see a well-tended little garden, wrinkled hands diligently watering the flowers.
An older lady, Hilde, in the courtyard, she is smiling. And then, Margret. She steps through the front door into the courtyard. Very carefully, one foot after the other. As if she had to learn to walk again.
The canvas is tucked under her arm. The one with the bouquet of flowers. Hilde looks up, examines, recognizes, and marvels. A bouquet of flowers in her hands.
HILDE: Margret?
The two women approach each other hesitantly. They meet amidst flowers, both painted and blooming.
